name: sf-pi
description: Opinionated Salesforce developer extensions for the pi coding agent — Apex/LWC LSP, Agent Script authoring, Slack research, and a TUI manager.

scripts.lint: npm run format:check && npm run generate-d360-registry:check && npm run generate-d360-references:check && npm run generate-d360-payload-examples:check && npm run generate-d360-v2-actions:check && npm run generate-d360-parity:check && npm run generate-catalog:check && npm run docs:health:check && npm run spdx:check && npm run check:lifecycle-scripts && npm run eslint
scripts.validate:ci: npm run validate && npm run eslint && npm run docs:health:check && bash scripts/check-llm-artifacts.sh

overridesNotes.fast-xml-parser: Force >= 5.7.0 to clear GHSA-gh4j-gqv2-49f6 (XMLBuilder CDATA injection). Reaches sf-pi through pi-ai -> AWS SDK Bedrock client; remove once upstream AWS SDK resolves the advisory.
overridesNotes.vitepress: VitePress 1.6.4 currently depends on Vite 5.x. Keep VitePress on the stable 1.x line for docs, but override its nested Vite/plugin-vue stack to patched versions that clear active Vite/esbuild advisories and still pass the docs build. Remove once VitePress 1.x or a stable 2.x release carries patched transitive dependencies.
overridesNotes.form-data: Force >= 4.0.6 to clear GHSA-hmw2-7cc7-3qxx (CRLF injection in multipart field names/filenames). Reaches sf-pi through @salesforce/core -> @jsforce/jsforce-node; remove once upstream ranges naturally resolve to a patched version.
overridesNotes.vitest: Vitest resolves Vite as a transitive test runner dependency. Force the patched Vite 7 line for tests until Vitest naturally resolves to a patched Vite release without overrides.
overridesNotes.esbuild: Force >= 0.28.1 to clear GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr. Vite uses esbuild as build/test tooling; remove once all Vite ranges in the tree naturally require a patched esbuild.
overridesNotes.vite: Direct dev dependency used to satisfy Vite peer imports for VitePress/Vitest while pinning a patched Vite line. Keep aligned with the transitive Vite overrides and remove only if docs/test tooling no longer requires a root peer install.
overridesNotes.@sf-agentscript/language: Canary override: force every AgentScript package onto language-service 2.9.0 so SF Pi uses the latest @sf-agentscript/language behavior even while some upstream packages still declare 2.5.4. Remove once @sf-agentscript/agentforce and @sf-agentscript/lsp naturally declare a 2.9.x-compatible language dependency.
overridesNotes.@sf-agentscript/types: Pair with the @sf-agentscript/language canary so the AgentScript toolchain resolves one foundational types package (0.2.3) instead of mixing 0.2.2 and 0.2.3. Remove with the language override once upstream declarations catch up.
